name: Lenox Park
address: 1400 East West Highway, Silver Spring, MD 20910
bathroomsNote: 2BR units come with 2 baths; 1BR units have 1 bath

notes.doormanEvidence: Multiple sources confirm 24-hour front desk: RentCafe lists '24/7 concierge,' ApartmentList lists '24-hour front desk,' and the Silver Spring Downtown directory explicitly states '24-hour lobby attendant.'
notes.balconyNote: Balconies/patios listed as an amenity on multiple sources, but described as available in 'select homes' on some listings; not every unit guaranteed.
notes.inUnitLaundryNote: Listed as in-home washer/dryer on all major sources, but one source qualifies it as 'select homes.'
notes.wellMaintainedNote: Reviews are mixed: hallways and common areas described as clean by some residents; at least one review cites a roach problem. Insufficient recent verified reviews to call clearly.
notes.packageRoomSource: RentCafe lists 'package acceptance' as an amenity; one aggregated search result names a 'package room' explicitly.
notes.unitClimateSource: Multiple sources cite 'individual climate-control' as a unit feature.
notes.has2BRNote: 2BR floor plans confirmed (Blair-G, Elsworth-DA series); no 1BR+den specifically listed, but the overall unit range goes up to 2,200 sqft across 1-3BR layouts.
notes.petPolicy: Up to 2 pets (cats and dogs); $300 one-time fee + $25/mo per pet
